\[ 347 \times 29 = 347 \times 20 + 347 \times 9 \]

arithmetic.response:
To solve \( 347 \times 29 \), we can use the standard multiplication method:

```
     347
   ×  29
   ------
    3123  (347 * 9)
 + 6940   (347 * 20, shifted one position to the left)
   ------
    9963
```

So, \( 347 \times 29 = 9963 \).
